title: JustTimm's Vanilla Additions - Winter Edition (+ Xmas Add-On)
description: Winter/Christmas-style resource packs for Vanilla Additions.
body:
[![Button](https://i.imgur.com/TL1ZBdF.png)](https://server.pro/?ref=JustTimmsAdditions "Sponsored by Server.pro")
[🖥️**Java**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/justtimms-vanilla-additions) | [🎮**Bedrock**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft-bedrock/addons/justtimms-vanilla-additions-bedrock) | [⚙️**Mod Support**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/justtimms-vanilla-additions-mod-support-add-on) | [🌙**Dark GUI**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/justtimms-vanilla-additions-dark-gui-add-on) | [🍁**Autumn Edition**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/justtimms-vanilla-additions-autumn-edition) | [❄️**Winter Edition**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/justtimms-vanilla-additions-winter-edition) | [🎅🏻**Xmas Add-On**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/justtimms-vanilla-additions-winter-edition)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Vanilla Additions - Winter Edition & Christmas Add-On are **2 additional packs** for my original pack Vanilla Additions. These packs changes Minecraft to give it an Winter/Christmas feel while still having a vanilla style. The christmas add-on contains things like Christmas lights, a Jolly llama, Christmas Chests and a lot more! Please only use these pack on top of my Vanilla Additions resource pack (With the xmas add-on on top of the winter pack)! You can find Vanilla Additions - Winter Edition on [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/justtimms-vanilla-additions-winter-edition), [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/justtimms-vanilla-additions-winter-edition) and [PlanetMinecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/justtimm-s-vanilla-additions-christmas-edition/)! ## Download [Vanilla Additions](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/justtimms-vanilla-additions) to make this pack work correctly! ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Keep in mind that the christmas add-on only adds all the Christmas related features. If you want snow you need to download the winter pack! **You can download the Christmas Add-On above the Winter Edition download in the ``versions`` tab!**
🎨Pack Order
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[📰**Twitter**](https://twitter.com/JT_Additions) | [📸**Instagram**](https://www.instagram.com/justtimms_additions) | [💬**Discord**](https://discord.gg/runTSv2) | [📽️**YouTube**](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCV4vHsM-p6GXsJTU-S7GSLQ?view_as=subscriber) | [📱**TikTok**](https://www.tiktok.com/@justtimms_additions) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
- 🧊 Custom Block Textures - ✏️ Custom Item Textures - 🗑️ Custom GUI's - 🐔 Custom Mob Textures - 🏷️ CTM Biome Based: - ⛰️ Blocks - ⛅ Sky - 🌳 Nature
⚙️ Recommended settings Video Settings -> Details... - Trees: Fancy/Default/Smart - Swamp Colors: **ON** Video Settings -> Quality... - Emissive Textures: **ON** - Connected Textures: **Fancy/Fast** - Custom Sky: **ON** - Custom Entity Models: **ON** - Random Entities: **ON** - Custom Items: **ON** - Custom GUIs: **ON** For people with shaders: - Waving Grass: **OFF**
(This is because you can sometimes you see a grass texture on a place where it shouldn't be.)
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[![Button](https://i.imgur.com/e5quQk0.png)](https://server.pro/?ref=JustTimmsAdditions "Sponsored by Server.pro") ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
You are **FREE** to: - Use this pack on your server. - Alter the pack for personal use. - Combine with other packs for personal use and play. - Use this pack in YouTube videos. (Credit is appreciated) You are **NOT** allowed to: - Claim ownership over the textures/models in this pack. - Reupload the entire resource pack elsewhere. - Redistribute unedited individual assets from the pack without permission and credit. - Redistribute edited assets from the pack without permission and credit. Thanks in advance. ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[![Button](https://i.imgur.com/bup8Qya.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/justtimms-vanilla-additions "Download Vanilla Additions") [![Button](https://i.imgur.com/8KYWZp6.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/justtimms-vanilla-additions-autumn-edition "Download Vanilla Additions - Autumn Edition") [![Button](https://i.imgur.com/XOj3uj4.png)](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/justtimm-s-vanilla-additions-dark-gui-add-on/ "Download Vanilla Additions - Dark GUI Add-On")
